creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
The current FAQ in:

	12.1  FreeBSD uses far more swap space than Linux. Why?
	Still says ELF migration isn't planned in the future.
	Of course we know that 3.0 will probably be ELF.

	12.5  Can I run DOS binaries under FreeBSD?
	Of course we know that 3.0-CURRENT has suport for this.

	13.10 Will FreeBSD ever support other architectures?
	A Sparc port is in progress.
